title: Inventory System for rd-132211
description: Mod add simple Inventory system and tweaks for Pre-classic rd-132211, oldest minecraft version, with new blocks from beta 1.7.3 and alpha infdev/indev versions with settings: fly, npc spawning, speed, crouch and sprint, block sounds and more
body:
Mod adds a simple inventory system to the earliest version of rd-132211-rd-20090515, and adds over 30 new blocks from the 1.7.3 beta/alpha versions, and a Creative tab with blocks, selection and sorting system

- E - Inventory
- P (or select on inventory) - settings
- B - Building Menu
- 1-9 - keys for select blocks

**To install in Prism / MultiMC Launcher create rd-132211 instance, click on it and select Edit, go to the Version, click on "Add/Replace Minecraft.jar" and select this file**

##  How to install:
 
![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nMgS0jvS/images/6ea6e6d895d7e931c8301ce5c74d066d8c43b733.png)
